---
title: "Introduction to Habitat Condition Assessment System (HCAS)"
author: "Roozbeh Valavi, ..."
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to Habitat Condition Assessment System (HCAS)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


## Introduction


## HCAS steps

Diagram here:




## Getting example data

```{r}
xy_train <- read.csv("P:/BMS/pacakge_data/samples/train_xy.csv")
obs_train <- read.csv("P:/BMS/pacakge_data/samples/train_obs.csv")
pred_train <- read.csv("P:/BMS/pacakge_data/samples/train_pred.csv")

```


## Histogram calculation


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, fig.width=5, fig.height=4}
histo <- ClassicHCAS::histogram(
  observed = obs_train,
  predicted = pred_train,
  samples_xy = xy_train,
  radius_km = 1000,
  bin_width = 0.03
)

plot(histo)

```


## Histogram normalisation


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=4}
norm <- ClassicHCAS::normalise(
  x = histo
)

plot(norm)

```


## Benchmarking


```{r}


```


## Calibration
